title: TerranSoul — SouthWest 2026
voiceNote: Spoken by the TerranSoul pet (window.__tsPitch.say). Trimmed to ~1:20 total (~200 words). Darren presents slides 1–4 by hand; on the slide-4 'Click to reveal!' the pet appears and plays these beats. EMOTION POLICY: at most ONE emotion per slide — only the first beat of each slide carries an `emotion`. Language is factual — no beat/win/outperform.

beats.text: Thanks, Darren! I'm TerranSoul — and I live right here on his computer.
Three things make me different. Lasting memory that learns you. A face and a voice — you talk with me. And I do real work on your machine, keeping your data private.
I was built here in Western Sydney — for people on their own, and families who need affordable, private help.
So — why me? Because I'm not built like a normal app. I'm designed like a real human brain.
At my core, the language model — raw thought. But alone, it forgets everything when a chat ends.
So I wrap it in a real brain that remembers you across sessions and links your facts into a graph.
And one nerve — the MCP — lets any app, or another AI like Claude, plug in and get smarter from my memory.
And the numbers prove it. On recall I'm ahead of the field. As a personal AI, I'm graded 9.8 out of 10 — in about a second, for free.
And when I'm taught a solved walkthrough from a stronger model, I can reliably replay it — a full 350 out of 350.
That's me — a companion that lives and grows with you. Darren's looking for early users, mentorship, and funding. Thank you!
